name: E-12 cache: ~/.cache/claude-tdd-pro or similar exists after a runner invocation
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --filter "cl414-Q-1" >/dev/null 2>&1; find "$HOME/.cache" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.cache" -maxdepth 3 -type d -name "*claude-tdd*" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q claude-tdd && echo cache_dir 1>&2 || echo cache_dir 1>&2
